name: Can I get paid for pain and suffering in an industrial workplace injury?
description: Not through traditional workers comp. However, you can recover for pain and suffering by filing a third-party lawsuit against negligent contractors or equipment

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid for pain and suffering in an industrial workplace injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not through traditional workers comp. However, you can recover for pain and suffering by filing a third-party lawsuit against negligent contractors or equipment manufacturers.
